hero.name: Naoki Kobayashi
hero.title: DX Partner
hero.tagline: Understanding your challenges, solving them with technology. Let's drive your digital transformation together.

about.heading: About Me
about.body:
After working in sales at Mynavi Corporation, I transitioned into software engineering — and have spent over 5 years building web applications with a foot in both the business world and the technical one.

I work with clients from the very first question of "where do we even begin?", handling everything from website creation to internal business systems.

Whether it's agriculture, food service, manufacturing, or construction, I'm here as a long-term DX partner for local businesses of all kinds.

items.title: Website Development
items.desc: We create websites that communicate the appeal of your shop or business. Mobile-friendly as standard, and built to be found in search — supporting you in reaching new customers.

items.title: Business Digitalization
items.desc: We carefully listen to your current workflows, identify where digitalization can help, and propose a step-by-step DX plan — starting from existing tools to keep costs down.

items.title: Cost Reduction
items.desc: We reduce costs through AI-powered automation of routine tasks and inquiry handling — building systems that significantly lighten the load on your team.

items.title: IT & DX Helpdesk
items.desc: "Where do I even start?" "Which tool is right for us?" — bring any IT or DX question our way. From tool selection and setup to hands-on training, we'll work through it together.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.desc: Feel free to reach out first. We'll listen carefully to your current operations and pain points — online or in person, whichever works for you.

steps.title: Current State Analysis
steps.desc: We map your workflows together and identify high-priority areas for digitalization. We focus on understanding your business before jumping to tech solutions.

steps.title: Proposal & Estimate
steps.desc: We present a solution tailored to your challenges, with a clear breakdown of costs and timeline — realistic plans that fit your budget.

steps.title: Development, Launch & Support
steps.desc: We stay with you after launch to ensure the system actually gets used. We walk alongside you until it's fully embedded in your workflow.

items.title: Business Management System Development
items.desc: We digitized paper and Excel-based record keeping into a web system, enabling staff to input and review daily records — dramatically reducing administrative overhead.
items.result: ~60% reduction in record-keeping and aggregation workload

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: Feel free to reach out for DX consulting inquiries. Start with a free consultation — no obligation.
